title: Critrical cPanel flaw mass-exploited in "Sorry" ransomware attacks
summary: A new disclosed cPanel flaw tracked as CVE-2026-41940 is being mass-exploited to breach websites and encrypt data in "Sorry" ransomware attacks. [...]
card_summary: A new disclosed cPanel flaw tracked as CVE-2026-41940 is being mass-exploited to breach websites and encrypt data in "Sorry" ransomware attacks. [...]

sections.context:
This aligns with ongoing ransomware campaigns targeting operational continuity and recovery readiness.

This fits the broader data-exposure trend where follow-on abuse of leaked information is common.

title: Trellix Confirms Source Code Breach With Unauthorized Repository Access
summary: Cybersecurity company Trellix has announced that it suffered a breach that enabled unauthorized access to a "portion" of its source code.
card_summary: Cybersecurity company Trellix has announced that it suffered a breach that enabled unauthorized access to a "portion" of its source code.

sections.context: This fits the broader data-exposure trend where follow-on abuse of leaked information is common.

email_summary: Cybersecurity company Trellix has announced that it suffered a breach that enabled unauthorized access to a "portion" of its source code. It said it "recently identified" the compromise of its source code repository and that it began working with "leading forensic experts" to resolve the matter immediately.

title: ConsentFix v3 attacks target Azure with automated OAuth abuse
summary: A new attack type, dubbed ConsentFix v3, has been circulating on hacker forums, building on the previous technique by adding automation and scaling potential. [...]
